Because both the houseplant and its standard pot fit inside the flower pot you won't need any extra potting soil. How convenient! Do I have to drill holes in my pot? Our outdoor pots already have holes. Our inside pots do not have pre-drilled holes. You can place your plant with the inner pot directly into all our indoor pots. What material are your pots made of? All our pots are made from 100% recycled plastic.
